reports.title: Knee Replacement Recovery — Phase 1
reports.description: Weeks 1–4 exercise programme for total knee arthroplasty. Includes 18 guided exercises with photo demonstrations.

reports.title: Initial Musculoskeletal Assessment
reports.description: Comprehensive initial assessment including range of motion, strength testing, posture analysis and functional movement screening results.

reports.title: 4-Week Progress Summary — Back Pain
reports.description: Monthly progress review including pain score trends, mobility improvements, functional outcome measures and upcoming programme adjustments.

reports.title: Understanding Your Shoulder: A Patient Guide
reports.description: Comprehensive guide to shoulder anatomy, common conditions, and self-management strategies for rotator cuff injuries and impingement.

reports.title: Sports Rehab — Return to Running Programme
reports.description: 12-week progressive return-to-running protocol for hamstring injuries. Includes sprint mechanics drills, strength work and load monitoring guidelines.

reports.title: Neurological Assessment — Stroke Rehabilitation
reports.description: Detailed functional assessment using Barthel Index, Berg Balance Scale and NIHSS scores. Includes goal-setting summary and 3-month rehabilitation plan.

reports.title: Managing Arthritis: Daily Movement Guide
reports.description: Practical guide to gentle daily movements, joint protection strategies and flare-up management for rheumatoid and osteoarthritis patients.

reports.title: Cardio Rehab — 8-Week Progress Review
reports.description: Bi-monthly progress report including exercise tolerance, heart rate response, dyspnoea scores and functional capacity assessments.

reports.title: Core Stability Programme — Lower Back Pain
reports.description: 8-week progressive core strengthening programme for chronic low back pain. Includes McKenzie exercises, Pilates-based movements and breathing techniques.
